name: Decadent Hershey Cake
recipeInstructions:
Mix together the Hershey syrup, melted candy bars, and vanilla extract.
In a separate bowl, cream the sugar and butter until light and fluffy.
Gradually add the chocolate mixture to the sugar-butter mixture and mix well.
Add the beaten eggs and blend in thoroughly.
In another bowl, combine the flour and baking soda. Add this mixture to the batter 1/3 at a time, mixing gently after each addition.
Fold in the buttermilk until just combined.
Pour the batter into a greased angel food pan and place it in a preheated oven set to 350°F (175°C).
Bake for 1-1/2 hours.
